generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance MotorActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor driving the first vertical axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
]

instance GearboxActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox transmission system for the robot's first vertical axis"
]

// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Directly mounted encoder on the permanent magnet synchronous motor measuring motor position and velocity"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentData, MotorAngleData, MotorTorqueData
]

instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder behind the gearbox measuring gearbox rotational position and velocity"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxAngleData, GearboxTorqueData, SystemOutputAngleData
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction - Data Transmitted
instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Measured input current (I_M) from motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance MotorAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Measured motor angle (r_M) from encoder data"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance MotorTorqueData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Measured motor torque (τ_M) derived from encoder data via manufacturer dynamics models"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance GearboxAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Measured gearbox angle (r_G) from secondary encoder"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoder
]

instance GearboxTorqueData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Measured gearbox torque (τ_G) derived from encoder data"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoder
]

instance SystemOutputAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Measured system output angle (r_out) from gearbox encoder"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoder
]

// C10: Models/Data - Simulation Models
instance MotorSimulation : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink model processing input current (I_M) to derive motor torque (τ_M) for friction analysis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance GearwheelSimulation : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink model modeling gearbox dynamics and torque transmission"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance CycloidalGearboxSimulation : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink model simulating final output torque (τ_out) for cycloidal gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

// C10: Data - Measured and Simulated Data
instance MeasuredMotorCurrent : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time measured input current (I_M) from motor encoder via MQTT protocol"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentData
]

instance MeasuredMotorAngle : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time measured motor angle (r_M) from encoder data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorAngleData
]

instance MeasuredMotorTorque : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time measured motor torque (τ_M) derived from encoder data via manufacturer dynamics models"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorTorqueData
]

instance MeasuredGearboxAngle : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time measured gearbox angle (r_G) from secondary encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxAngleData
]

instance MeasuredGearboxTorque : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time measured gearbox torque (τ_G) derived from encoder data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxTorqueData
]

instance MeasuredOutputAngle : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time measured system output angle (r_out) from gearbox encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SystemOutputAngleData
]

instance SimulatedMotorAngle : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated motor angle (δr_M) derived from friction models (Coulomb-Viscous) for comparison"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorAngleData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulatedMotorTorque : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated motor torque (δτ_M) derived from friction models (Coulomb-Viscous) for comparison"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorTorqueData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulatedGearboxAngle : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated gearbox angle (δr_G) derived from friction models for comparison"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxAngleData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulatedGearboxTorque : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated gearbox torque (δτ_G) derived from friction models (Coulomb-Viscous/Stribeck/LuGre) for comparison"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxTorqueData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulatedOutputAngle : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated system output angle (δr_out) derived from friction models for comparison"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SystemOutputAngleData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance FrictionModelMetadata : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Metadata traces linking friction models to their computational origins (Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, LuGre)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance MQTTProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Real-time sensor data streaming protocol (MQTT) from robot's Siemens SINUMERIK 840D CNC controller to digital shadow"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance MATLABSimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink environment implementing friction models (Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, LuGre) for simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, ModelAdaptationService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Digital twin infrastructure (AAS) linking physical and virtual components for dynamic model exchange"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelAdaptationService, OperationalMonitoringService
]

// C6: Services
instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time friction identification using white-box (analytical) and black-box (data-driven) friction models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParameterInsight, ControlAdjustmentAction
]

instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visualization dashboard comparing measured vs. simulated data (torque/velocity) for proactive maintenance"
    DTDFVocab:provides DeviationInsight, MonitoringInsight
]

instance ModelAdaptationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Dynamic exchange of friction models via Asset Administration Shell for continuous adaptation to operational changes"
    DTDFVocab:provides ParameterUpdateAction
]

instance OperationalMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous monitoring of system performance with friction compensation feedback"
    DTDFVocab:provides MaintenanceRecommendationAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance FrictionParameterInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time detection of static/kinetic/viscous friction via model-data comparisons (τ_G vs. δτ_G)"
]

instance ControlAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Parameters derived from digital shadow (Coulomb friction coefficient) fed back into robot's control system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DeviationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualizations highlighting deviations between measured and simulated data for proactive maintenance"
]

instance MonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Operational monitoring dashboard showing tooling changes and wear mitigation recommendations"
]

instance ParameterUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamic adaptation of friction models via Asset Administration Shell for continuous improvement"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance MaintenanceRecommendationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Proactive maintenance actions based on friction-induced deviations (tooling changes, wear mitigation)"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// C1: System Environment
instance RobotVerticalAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains MotorActuator, GearboxActuator
]

instance MABIMAX100RobotEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains RobotVerticalAxisEnvironment,
    base:desc "Industrial robot system with ±190° working range and max speed of 75°/s"
]

instance FrictionAnalysisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains RobotVerticalAxisEnvironment,
    base:desc "Digital twin environment focused on reducing up to 30% inaccuracies caused by friction in robot joints"
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The digital twin operates in **real-time**, with data streams processed at **sub-second intervals** aligned with the robot’s operational cycle. Live data is continuously aggregated via MQTT, ensuring synchronization with the physical system’s motion dynamics."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The digital twin constellation is **centralized and purpose-driven**:
  - **Single digital shadow** for the first axis of the MABI MAX 100 robot, orchestrated around:
    1. **Purpose**: Understanding friction behavior to improve motion accuracy.
    2. **Asset**: First axis (motor + gearbox).
    3. **Data sources**: Live sensor streams (MQTT), simulation models (MATLAB Simulink), and dynamics models.
    4. **Processing pipeline**: Data traces are processed via simulation models (e.g., Coulomb-Viscous friction) to generate friction-aware predictions.
    5. **Output**: Visualized in a dashboard for real-time monitoring and control adjustments."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital twin operates across the **operational phase** of the robot, focusing on:
  - **As-operated representation**: Captures real-time friction behavior during robot operation (e.g., machining tasks).
  - **No explicit stages for design/manufacture**: The digital shadow is created post-deployment to support **continuous improvement** of motion accuracy during runtime."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Verification/Validation**:
    - **Sensor calibration**: Motor and gearbox encoders reduce positional uncertainty by comparing readings.
    - **Model validation**: Friction models (e.g., LuGre) are validated against real-time sensor data to adjust parameters dynamically.
  - **Uncertainty management**:
    - **Error propagation**: Differences between measured and simulated data (e.g., *τ_M* vs. ˆ*τ_M*) highlight friction-induced deviations.
    - **Uncertainty quantification**: Friction models account for variability due to load, temperature, and wear via configurable parameters.
  - **Uncertainty sources**:
    - **Measurement noise**: Encoder resolution limits precision.
    - **Model assumptions**: Friction models (e.g., Coulomb-Viscous) assume ideal conditions; real-world deviations are captured via live data."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The technical connection uses:
  - **Protocol**: **MQTT** for real-time sensor data streaming from the Siemens SINUMERIK 840D CNC controller to the digital shadow system.
  - **Network architecture**: Data traces are linked to their structural sources via **SysML models** (e.g., Block Definition Diagram) and **Asset Administration Shells (AAS)** for traceability.
  - **Data flow**: One-way data flow (digital shadow passive) with active processing components (e.g., MATLAB Simulink simulations) interpreting incoming data."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The digital twin adheres to:
  - **Modeling standards**: **SysML** for structural/behavioral modeling.
  - **Digital shadow reference model**: Follows the **Digital Shadow Reference Model (DSRM)** (Kritzinger et al., Michael et al.) for traceability and metadata management.
  - **Asset Administration Shells (AAS)**: Standardized framework for linking digital and physical components (ISO/TC 44/SC 3)."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety are addressed by:
  - **Safety constraints**: The robot’s **safety cell** limits the working range to ±90°, preventing unsafe operations.
  - **Passive nature**: The digital shadow is **non-interactive**, preventing autonomous actions that could pose risks to human operators.
  - **Data integrity**: MQTT ensures reliable, real-time data transmission, though security protocols (e.g., encryption) are not explicitly detailed."
]
